name: Mixed Grain Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the shallots and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the brown rice, wild rice, and wheat berries to the pan. Stir and coat with the oil.
4. Pour in the water and vegetable broth.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and cook until the grains are tender and have absorbed most of the liquid, about 40 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the dried cranberries, chopped dried apricots, and dried currants.
7. Whisk together the sherry vinegar, olive oil, and dried sage in a small bowl to make the dressing.
8. Pour the dressing over the salad and stir to coat evenly.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. The salad can be prepared up to one day ahead of time. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve. Stir in the chopped pecans just before serving.
